chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2428 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on CMA No. 5166/2023. 2) For orders on CMA No.23932/2021. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 28.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Chaudhry, Advocate / Petitioner in person. Ms. Shajia Hanjra, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Mohammad Abdullah, Advocate for Respondent/K-Electric. ________________ Petitioner is in person, who is by profession an advocate, has filed this petition against K-Electric stating that K-Electric is causing harassment to him and his family as summons have been issued by Special Magistrate (page 167 of the file) is illegal. We have heard petitioner and learned counsel for the other side. We are not satisfied with maintainability of this petition, as, if the petitioner has any grievance he may approach the Electric Inspector. As and when the petitioner so approaches, the Electric Inspector shall decide the application of the petitioner expeditiously within three months. The petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
